title: No Down Payment
writer: Philip Yordan, John McPartland, Ben Maddow
actors: Joanne Woodward, Sheree North, Tony Randall
plot: In California, four couples who have bought houses near one another face problems, alcoholism, racism, promiscuity, and discrimination against lack of education, until a tragic event forces them to reassess their lives.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 1 win & 2 nominations total
